title: Photoshop files, quick filtering, and a smarter status bar
notes: Open Photoshop (.psd) files — preview them, rotate or flip, and export as PNG
Filter thumbnails by typing — the grid narrows live as you type, Esc clears
Filter the file browser with / — type parts of a name in any order to find it
The status bar now shows your position in the folder and the current page
Adjust the status bar font size to your liking
Delete the current file straight to the recycle bin
Files opened into an already-running window now come into view without stealing focus
